title: Yggdrasil Alternative
description: An alternative version of Yggdrasil that is better suited for modpacks and plugin servers, adding different content and removing other content compared to the original version.
body:
# Yggdrasil Alternative
![Splash Art](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6cf786c2fd06fd8db9ca63c4026258129b99b99.webp)

![Delimeter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c57c204c55df0ce5357df6501f616f2c7b7c6df1.png)

# What is Yggdrasil Alternative?
Yggdrasil Alternative is a completely new variant of the original Yggdrasil pack. This version replaces problematic mechanics to provide a **lighter, more compatible experience** perfect for multiplayer servers. 
- Vaults are replaced by Copper Chests and related keys are removed.
- Custom Dimensions are deleted.

Since it adds less experimental Minecraft content, no Vaults, and doesn't integrate Minecraft commands, **it is better suited for Spigot/Bukkit/Paper, as well as large modpacks.**

This pack concretely adds the structures, their lore, difficulty, and interesting rewards.

> **Note:** Since Yggdrasil 6.0.0, the original pack no longer includes the Runic Dimension either. The main difference now is that Alternative replaces Vaults with Copper Chests. Starting from 1.26.1, the original Yggdrasil will reintroduce the Runic Dimension — this Alternative version will **not** include it.

![Delimeter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c57c204c55df0ce5357df6501f616f2c7b7c6df1.png)

# Original Yggdrasil
This pack **adds 20 structures included 5 mega structure** that take hours to explore. Magnificent structures that spawn all over the world, and gives unique rewards, and combined with NeoEnchant it gets even better!

Yggdrasil **offers structures, quests, and a developed narrative** with story fragments that can be found and read in any order, like the memories in Zelda Breath of the Wild.

*Click on the image to go to [Yggdrasil Original on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/datapack/yggdrasil-structure).*

[![Yggdrasil Original](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b4422c4bbd399fd4b0eb68f8a7634747aebee12.webp)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/yggdrasil-structure)

![Delimeter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c57c204c55df0ce5357df6501f616f2c7b7c6df1.png)

# Documentation
For detailed information about **Yggdrasil, NeoEnchant, Whisper of Ethers**, or the web tools offered by Voxel, please refer to the documentation.
It contains all the information about the new content in Voxel, Enchantment, Structure, and everything else.

*Click on the image below to access the complete wiki. [Wiki Links](https://hardels-organization.gitbook.io/voxel)*

[![Documentation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/baeded70d64657f66ab232f72a442e77cb4ce387_0.webp)](https://hardels-organization.gitbook.io/voxel)

![Delimeter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c57c204c55df0ce5357df6501f616f2c7b7c6df1.png)

# The Neo-Ecosystem
To further enhance the immersion, you can add one of the following packs, which are optional but work great with Yggdrasil.

- **[NeoEnchant+](https://modrinth.com/datapack/neoenchant)** — Over 40 unique, well-balanced enchantments. Each can be obtained in Yggdrasil structures or through vanilla methods.
- **[BeyondEnchant](https://modrinth.com/datapack/beyondenchant)** — Breaks the chains of vanilla limits. Enchantment levels are increased, making them more powerful.
- **[Yggdrasil Original](https://modrinth.com/datapack/yggdrasil-structure)** — The full experience with quests, narrative, Vaults, and the upcoming Runic Dimension.
- **[Whisper of Ether](https://modrinth.com/mod/whisper_of_ether)** — Adds forgemagic to equipment, explore powerful weapons and armor perfect for combat!

![Packs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4c5e44f01c1ba289bdf22caa4174b986f7e0a46.webp)

![Delimeter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c57c204c55df0ce5357df6501f616f2c7b7c6df1.png)

# Support the Project
Join us on Patreon and help make Minecraft an even more amazing experience for everyone!
With more support, I can make tools for creators, players, and modders. I plan to create the **Hytale asset editor in Minecraft!**

[![Patreon](https://images.ctfassets.net/4rnblstkg79m/5TumqlgINUoJBVWFRRU6wz/e64dfea04fe5b19e60fa27310114853f/WolffOlins_Patreon.jpg)](https://www.patreon.com/hardel)
